# Young Contractors Ltd

> Premium tiling and stone worktop specialists serving London's most prestigious residential and commercial developments.

Young Contractors Ltd is a leading tiling company specialising in the supply and installation of natural stone, porcelain, large-format tiles, and mosaic wall/floor tiling. We also offer bespoke stone worktops across residential, retail, leisure, and commercial sectors.

## Services

- Tiling Solutions: Residential, retail, leisure, commercial, wet room systems, tiled pedestal systems
- Fabrication Services: Kitchen tops, splashbacks, vanity tops, bespoke items
- Repair & Maintenance: Natural stone repairs, polishing, anti-slip application

## Contact

- Phone: 07931 216828
- Email: danny@youngcontractors.co.uk
- Address: C/O Azets River House, 1 Maidstone Road, Sidcup, Kent, DA14 5RH
- Instagram: @young_contractorsltd

## Certifications

- The Tile Association (TTA) member
- RB Services affiliated

## Notable Projects

- Royal Mint Gardens (IJM Land) - 263 units
- Chelsea Waterfront (Hutchison Property Group) - 326 units
- York Place (Avanton) - 299 units
- Premier Place (Greycoat) - 9-floor office refurbishment
- Riverstone Fulham (Riverstone Living) - 160 units
